title: ColemakCaps
description: Restores caps lock as backspace for the 6 Colemak backspace users in Minecraft.
body: ColemakCaps is a simple mod designed for Minecraft players who use the Colemak keyboard layout with caps lock as backspace enabled. It remaps the Caps Lock key to function as Backspace, fixing the issue where Caps Lock behaves incorrectly in-game when using this layout.
